heading: Small and medium publicly owned treatment works circuit rider program
label: 1302b Small and medium publicly owned treatment works circuit rider program

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, not later than 180 days after , the Administrator shall establish a circuit rider program (referred to in this section as the “circuit rider program”) under which the Administrator shall award grants to qualified nonprofit entities, as determined by the Administrator, to provide assistance to owners and operators of small and medium publicly owned treatment works to carry out the activities described in .November 15, 2021section 1382(b)(13) of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: A grant provided under the circuit rider program shall be in an amount that is not more than $75,000.
has a history, for not less than the 10 years prior to the award of the grant, of unresolved wastewater issues, stormwater issues, or a combination of wastewater and stormwater issues;
faces the cumulative burden of stormwater and wastewater overflow issues; or
has previously failed to access Federal technical assistance due to cost-sharing requirements.

children.heading: Communication
children.label: d Communication
children.text: Each qualified nonprofit entity that receives funding under this section shall, before using that funding to undertake activities to carry out this section, consult with the State in which the assistance is to be expended or otherwise made available.
each recipient of a grant under the circuit rider program; and
a summary of the activities carried out under the circuit rider program.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $10,000,000 for the period of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: Limitation on use of funds
children.label: 2 Limitation on use of funds
children.text: Of the amounts made available for grants under paragraph (1), not more than 2 percent may be used to pay the administrative costs of the Administrator.
